about.subtitle: Resume & Profile
about.title: About Me
about.bio: A Junior Web Developer passionate about creating interactive web experiences and secure APIs. I build scalable applications focused on clean frontend designs and robust backend architectures, approaching every project with dedication and attention to detail.
about.experience_bullet1: Collaborated on the integration of artificial vision models into interactive web interfaces.
about.experience_bullet2: Participated in the design of real-time control panels for hardware management.
about.experience_bullet3: Implemented data synchronization logic between physical sensors and software.
about.education_degree: Higher Degree in Web Applications Development (DAW)

projects.subtitle: Featured Work
projects.title: Projects
projects.matchcota_desc1: REST API implemented in FastAPI featuring strict secure data isolation models for multiple concurrent client organizations. Uses connection pooling and custom tenant-key middleware to prevent cross-organization leakage.
projects.matchcota_desc2: Designed a custom algorithm powered by mathematical scoring rules to evaluate compatibility profiles efficiently, using weighted metrics and customizable preference matrices.
projects.matchcota_desc3: Implemented asynchronous routing and background task workers in Python to offload computationally heavy matching requests, ensuring low latency responses.
projects.banc_temps_desc1: Developed an interactive React frontend integrated with a powerful, secure Django Rest Framework backend service, enabling real-time dashboard updates for time bank members.
projects.banc_temps_desc2: Fully containerized local setup leveraging Docker and Docker Compose, orchestrating React frontend, Django API, and PostgreSQL database.
projects.banc_temps_desc3: Implemented secure JSON Web Token (JWT) credentials with cookie-based rotation to protect APIs, mitigate CSRF/XSS risks, and control role-based access.
